{{Quote|Of course, we never did catch up to him, but we did notice the ''Accuser'', his ship, has a slightly malfunctioning starboard thrust converter. So if you see a Ghtroc in that area that looks like its right engine is in on the blink, you might want to consider calling in the SpecForces.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Tole Warren]]'s intelligence report on Kal-tan-shi (extract)|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Kal-tan-shi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tiss'shar]] who worked as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Kal-tan-shi began his career as a hunter for [[House Paramexor]], specializing in no living [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]]. During this time he began a fierce rivalry with another [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], [[Ssach'thirix]]. As well he began to develop a severe hatred and almost fear of [[Droid/Legends|droids]].

After a successful career under Paramexor, he eventually made the choice to continue working alone, perhaps to further pursue his nemesis Ssach'thirix even though Paramexor were still customizing his [[Starship/Legends|starship]] at that moment (the modifications were never completed). Although Guild Master [[Janq Paramexor]] frowned upon this decision, Janq and Kal-tan-shi kept a strong friendship and were seen dining together years later.

Kal-tan-shi commonly specialized in bounties that targeted members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] because the payout was typically higher than the money offered for [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] or gangsters, and because the challenge was greater. He commonly murdered his prey if he knew that the bounty was the same for a living capture or a death mark. As of [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], he had captured or killed at least seventeen Rebel operatives, including high-ranking Generals [[Tfin]] and [[Wuvnir]] at [[Yhuli Docking Port 32|Yuhli Docking Port 32]]. He also killed two [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] envoys plus a seven-member entourage in the [[Veron Minor system/Legends|Veron Minor system]].

Rebel lieutenant [[Tole Warren]] was assigned to track Kal-tan-shi since he was the only non-droid fluent in [[Tiss'shar (language)|Tiss'shar]]. Warren was never able to accomplish his mission, however, yet he did find the bounty hunter's ship, the [[Accuser (720 light freighter)|''Accuser'']], and noticed a failure in the starboard thrust converter. Warren reported this information for future Rebel watchers.
